name: Cucumber Stir-Fried with Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
1/2 tsp Chili flakes or chili powder
recipeInstructions:
1. CUT THE PORK into thin slices, about 1/8-inch by 3 inches long.
2. IN A MEDIUM-SIZED BOWL, COMBINE THE PORK WITH SOY SAUCES, RICE WINE, SESAME OIL AND CORNSTARCH. SET ASIDE.
3. PEEL THE CUCUMBERS, SPLIT THEM IN HALF, AND SCRAPE OUT THE SEEDS. FINELY SLICE THE CUCUMBER.
4. HEAT A WOK OR LARGE SAUTÉ PAN UNTIL HOT. ADD OIL, THEN CHILI BEAN SAUCE, GARLIC, DICED SICHUAN PEPPERCORN, CHILI FLAKES AND SALT. STIR-FRY FOR 10 SECONDS.
5. ADD THE PORK TO THE PAN; STIR-FRY FOR 1 MINUTE.
6. ADD CUCUMBERS; STIR-FRY FOR 1 MINUTE.
7. POUR IN SOY SAUCE, WINE, VINEGAR AND SUGAR. STIR-FRY FOR 2 MORE MINUTES, OR UNTIL ALL LIQUID HAS EVAPORATED.
8. SERVE IMMEDIATELY.
